name: Nike Air Max 270
description: Lightweight running shoe with Air Max cushioning. Available in black, white, and red. Sizes 38-47. Water-resistant upper. Ideal for daily runs and casual wear.

name: Adidas Ultraboost 22
description: High-performance running shoe with Boost midsole. Available in grey and blue. Sizes 39-46. Knit upper for breathability. Best for long-distance running.

name: Samsung Galaxy S25
description: Flagship Android smartphone. 6.7 inch AMOLED display, 200MP camera, 5000mAh battery. Available in black and silver. 256GB storage. Supports 5G.

name: Apple AirPods Pro 3
description: Wireless earbuds with active noise cancellation. Up to 30 hours battery with case. Compatible with iPhone and Android. Sweat-resistant. Comes in white only.

name: Levi's 501 Original Jeans
description: Classic straight-fit denim jeans. Available in dark blue, light blue, and black. Sizes 28-40 waist. 100% cotton. Machine washable.

name: The North Face Fleece Jacket
description: Warm fleece jacket for outdoor activities. Available in green and navy. Sizes S to XXL. Zip pockets. Suitable for hiking and camping in cold weather.

name: Dyson V15 Vacuum Cleaner
description: Cordless vacuum cleaner with laser dust detection. 60 minutes battery life. Suitable for all floor types including carpet and hardwood. HEPA filter included.

name: IKEA KALLAX Shelf Unit
description: Modular shelf unit with 4 compartments. Available in white and oak finish. Dimensions: 77x77cm. Easy self-assembly. Max load 13kg per compartment.

name: Whey Protein Powder - Vanilla
description: Premium whey protein isolate. 25g protein per serving. 30 servings per bag. No artificial sweeteners. Vanilla flavour. Suitable for post-workout recovery.

name: Yoga Mat - 6mm
description: Non-slip yoga and exercise mat. 6mm thickness for joint support. 183x61cm. Available in purple, blue, and black. Includes carrying strap. Easy to clean.
